hero.eyebrow: Computer Science at UC Santa Cruz
hero.headline: Nagatanmayee Gunukula
hero.bio: I am a computer science student, Oracle ACE Pro, and builder across data science, cloud software, automation, AI research, and full‑stack product experiences. I like turning messy workflows into scalable systems that feel clear, useful, and fast.

experience.description: Applying data science, analytics, and product‑minded problem solving to turn complex datasets into clear technical insights and useful decision‑support workflows.
Built an end‑to‑end Python data pipeline for outbound sales infrastructure, scaled lead generation by 3x, and redesigned the core website UI in Framer for early onboarding tests.

experience.organization: Nela IT Solutions - San Ramon, CA
experience.description: Automated AWS‑based cloud data workflows with Python and Oracle SQL, improving processing accuracy, scalability, and cloud resource efficiency.
Engineered a local Neuro‑Symbolic Logic‑LM framework with Python, LangChain, and SWI‑Prolog for deterministic queries, while deploying CNN workflows through Kubernetes PVCs and self‑terminating Jobs.
Supporting mission‑driven consulting work through research, analysis, strategy, and client‑facing recommendations for social impact organizations.

projects.title: Ticket Demand & Scarcity ML Pipeline
projects.description: Automated an end‑to‑end predictive pipeline with Random Forest modeling on multi‑modal API data, then designed a custom Demand‑to‑Supply Ticket Scarcity Index across five major California arenas.

projects.title: Fault‑Tolerant F1 Telemetry Engine
projects.description: Built a raw TCP/UDP socket telemetry replication engine that processed 5,000+ events per second with microsecond latency and used a custom Write‑Ahead Log for zero‑data‑loss node recovery.

certifications.title: Oracle ACE Pro Award
certifications.description: Oracle Corporation recognition for technical contribution and community impact.

certifications.title: OCI AI Foundations Associate
certifications.description: AI services, applied cloud AI, and responsible AI foundations.

certifications.title: OCI Multicloud Architect
certifications.description: Cloud architecture and multicloud platform strategy.

certifications.title: Snowflake Hands‑On Essentials
certifications.description: Practical data‑platform training across Snowflake workflows and cloud data fundamentals.

leadership.description: Leading a nonprofit focused on connection, access, and support for senior communities through operations, outreach, partnerships, and mission‑driven program development.

Launched a core web platform in Framer and architected a Python‑based CRM ingestion pipeline that automated founder identification, multi‑channel prospecting, and qualification logic for early user acquisition.
